author: terencechain

author: terencechain
content:
ok ill type it out.. so you can look later...

TLDR: 
  - Slot 1151's payload envelope arrived 1m48s late 
  - slot 1154 had already been built skipping it, producing block `A` at EL height 1148.
  - When 1151's payload finally landed, it became block `B`, also at EL height 1148.
  - Slot 1152 built on B, so Prysm's CL chose chain B as canonical (why did we choose B as canonical? more attetation weight? need FC dump)
  - Nethermind imported both as Valid, but its block-by-number index still points at A, so when Prysm advanced safeBlockHash to B, Nethermind looked up height 1148, got A, and rejected every FCU with -38002 Inconsistent ForkChoiceState - safe block hash.
  - Stuck ~9 min until Nethermind caught up. 6 missed proposals total (2 on nethermind-1, 4 on nethermind-2)

author: terencechain
content: im figuring out why we only got 1151 late but most nodes got it on time

author: terencechain
content: still no clue why the envelope is never received on our end.. there's no ignore or reject log. Maybe per topic mesh is starved? peering related?

author: terencechain
content: the second bug is FCU invalid state issue, ill leave that to you potuz.. but i strongly suspect its a nethermind bug
